3d96305d-b9d7-4aa3-8cb7-ee584fa7f75c.name: Ripple Effect
3d96305d-b9d7-4aa3-8cb7-ee584fa7f75c.fragmentShader: uniform sampler2D uPreviousFrame;uniform vec2 uMouse;uniform float uTime;uniform float uDeltaTime;void mainImage(const in vec4 inputColor, const in vec2 uv, out vec4 outputColor) {  float dist = distance(uv, uMouse);  float ripple = sin(dist * 20.0 - uTime * 5.0) * 0.006;  float strength = smoothstep(0.2, 0.0, dist);  vec2 offset = normalize(uv - uMouse) * ripple * strength;  vec4 colorR = texture2D(uPreviousFrame, uv + offset + vec2(0.005, 0.0) * strength);  vec4 colorG = texture2D(uPreviousFrame, uv + offset);  vec4 colorB = texture2D(uPreviousFrame, uv + offset - vec2(0.005, 0.0) * strength);  outputColor = vec4(colorR.r, colorG.g, colorB.b, 1.0);}

43bd54e1-e5c0-4c9b-8b1a-081f3a218f19.name: Custom Effect
43bd54e1-e5c0-4c9b-8b1a-081f3a218f19.fragmentShader: void mainImage(const in vec4 inputColor, const in vec2 uv, out vec4 outputColor) { outputColor = inputColor; }

31118664-18f1-4829-ba86-3e30e115f0e8.name: Custom Effect
31118664-18f1-4829-ba86-3e30e115f0e8.fragmentShader: void mainImage(const in vec4 inputColor, const in vec2 uv, out vec4 outputColor) { outputColor = inputColor; }
